crossChecks.motorWeight: Computed all-up weight must remain inside selected motor absoluteAllUpWeightG.
crossChecks.materialSpan: Requested wingspan must remain inside selected material absoluteWingspanMM.
crossChecks.materialChord: Root chord must be at least the material minimumRootChordMM.
crossChecks.flyingWing: Elevons-only designs require flying-wing overrides for CG, sweep, taper, and fin percentage.
crossChecks.controlStyle: The requested style must be listed in the control configuration allowedStyles.
crossChecks.tailArm: Tailed aircraft must keep tail arm within tailArmToMACRatio.
crossChecks.novelty: Candidate must pass novelty.json after engineering validation.
